$comment: refactor: a type-safe rename across a workspace module. The model reads the module API, turns a free-text request ('rename X to Y') into the exact target + new name, and gorename renames every reference across files (then verifies the build). api -> plan -> apply -> done | fail. No code generation - gorename does the edit deterministically. Run: `ratchet flow . refactor --ws <proj> "rename Balance to BalanceOf"`.
summary: Type-safe rename across a module: the model maps a request to a target, gorename renames every reference and verifies the build.
